# Descrybe Legal Engine

Ground your work in clean, structured U.S. primary law

-   More
    
    [Documentation](https://app.descrybe.com/connect/docs)[Privacy Policy](https://descrybe.com/legal/privacy)[Support](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#563f3830391632332535242f34337835393b)
    

The Descrybe Connector gives Claude access to legal research tools for working with primary law. It can help analyze a research question, search cases by legal concept or exact wording, find cases from citations or messy references, extract authorities from pasted text, retrieve summaries, case PDFs, and focused opinion passages, search statutes and regulations, check case treatment status, find citing cases, and verify quoted language against known cases.

You can use Descrybe to:

**Find and understand a case someone cited:**  
"My landlord's lawyer cited Green v. Superior Court in a letter. Can you find the case, summarize what it says, and explain why it might matter?"

**Understand a legal issue before talking to a lawyer:**  
"I was fired after asking for medical leave in New York. What legal issues should I research first?"

**Research what courts have said about similar facts:**  
"Find cases where tenants challenged eviction after reporting unsafe apartment conditions."

**Check whether a quoted case really says what someone claims:**  
"Can you verify whether this quote actually appears in the case they cited, and show me the surrounding passage?"

**Extract and organize authorities from legal paperwork:**  
"I received this motion. Extract the cited cases and help me understand what authorities the other side is relying on."
